_note: Hinglish（ローマ字のヒンディー英語混在）。空欄/未定義のキーは自動で日本語にフォールバックします。最終的にはネイティブ確認推奨。
meta.title: Dropper | Bas file drop karo, baaki hum dekh lenge
meta.desc: Dropper ek series hai chote tools ki, jahan aap bas file drop karte ho aur kaam ho jaata hai. Pehla tool event dates ko Google Calendar mein daal deta hai.
hero.sub: Bas file drop karo, baaki hum dekh lenge
hero.catchMain:
File drop karo.
Aage hum sambhal lenge.
hero.catchClose: Aur tools jald aa rahe hain.
tools.label: Series
tools.title: Dropper series
tools.desc: Aise tools jo aap sirf file drop karke use karte ho. Jo karna hai uske hisaab se chunein aur turant shuru karein.
tool1.name: Calendar Dropper
tool1.desc: Bas event ka flyer (PDF ya image) drop karo, aur date aur venue Google Calendar mein automatic add ho jaate hain. Flyer, roster, results aur photos bhi event ke saath attach ho jaate hain. Kisi bhi sport ya event ke liye.
placeholder.name: Agla Dropper jald aa raha hai
placeholder.desc: Naye drop-to-use tools hum dheere-dheere add karte rahenge. Release tak intezaar karein.
policy.label: Notes
policy.title: Shuru karne se pehle
policy.desc: Hum price ko jitna ho sake kam rakhte hain taaki koi bhi try kar sake. Iske badle, kharidne se pehle ye baatein dhyan mein rakhein.
policy.p1desc: Har tool itne kam price mein hai ki aap bina soche try kar sakte hain. Sirf wahi chunein jo chahiye.
policy.p2desc: Price kam rakhne ke liye, hum one-on-one support nahi dete. Use kaise karna hai, har tool ki guide dekhein.
policy.p3desc: Support nahi hai, lekin tools ko time-time par improve kiya jata hai, aur nayi jaankari tool se automatic aapko milti hai.
about.label: About
about.title: Dropper kya hai
about.desc: “Bas file drop karo, aur jhanjhat khatam.” In chote tools ko hum Dropper kehte hain, aur ek series ke roop mein banate aur release karte hain. Pehla tool event dates ko calendar mein daalta hai. Sab same tarah kaam karte hain — bas drop — isliye sirf kisi khaas group ya sport ke liye nahi, koi bhi use kar sakta hai. Aur tools time ke saath add honge.
